Case Study • Various

How we helped Fusion Park LLC appoints Dr. Nitin Dumasia as “Global Sustainability Advisor”

The Challenge

Detailed inside.

Our Solution

Detailed inside.

The Results

Detailed inside.

New York, USA – October 25, 2023

Fusion Park LLC, founded to help climate tech companies with impactful, commercially ready technologies accelerate its growth and impact in the most timely and sustainable manner, is pleased to announce the appointment of Dr. Nitin Dumasia as its Global Sustainability Advisor.

Dr. Nitin Dumasia is a renowned ESG & Business Sustainability expert with over two decades of experience in the field. He holds a Ph.D. in ESG & Business Sustainability Management and has worked in various capacities to address pressing sustainability challenges. Dr. Dumasia is President & CEO of Growlity, Inc. which is a USA based advisory company for Environmental, Social & Governance (ESG) related services across the world. Dr. Dumasia brings a wealth of knowledge and experience to this role and will play a pivotal part in advancing Fusion Park‘s commitment to global sustainability and environmental stewardship.

In his new role at Fusion Park, Dr. Dumasia will be responsible for shaping and driving the client’s sustainability strategy. This will include the development and execution of initiatives aimed at reducing the company’s carbon footprint, enhancing its commitment to renewable energy, and fostering a culture of environmental responsibility.

Fusion Park‘s Founder & Managing Partner, Mr. James Tu, stated, “We are delighted to welcome Dr. Nitin Dumasia to the Fusion Park family. His vast experience and expertise in ESG & Sustainability make him the ideal addition to guide our global sustainability efforts. Fusion Park LLC aims to be the trusted partner for companies that have brilliant people, big ideas, commercially ready technologies and burning passion on making positive changes to the world’s environment and sustainability. In other words, we want to accelerate positive change the climate tech companies bring for humanity to mitigate and adapt to climate change”.

Dr. Dumasia expressed his enthusiasm about the this responsibility, saying, “I’m honored to onboard Fusion Park, a company that is committed to sustainability at its core. I look forward to working with the talented team at Fusion Park to drive meaningful change and make a positive impact on the environment. Our mission is clear: to create innovative, sustainable solutions that benefit not only our company but also the planet to inclusively explore Growth with Sustainability”

For media inquiries, please reach out to :  contact@growlity.com
